temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) In a dimly lit, rustic room, a man in a patterned sweater lies on a wooden floor, his head and shoulders propped up by his hands. He is in extreme distress, gasping for air and grimacing in pain as if being choked or strangled by an unseen force. (Storyline: The scene opens on a moment of intense physical struggle, immediately establishing a sense of danger and mystery. The man's pained expression suggests he is in mortal danger.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Pained, strained. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous musical score begins to build tension.)
(00:04-00:07) The man's struggle intensifies as he gasps for air, his face contorted in agony. He looks up with wide, terrified eyes, his mouth open in a silent scream, as if he is being tortured. (Storyline: The tension escalates as the man's struggle becomes more desperate, highlighting his helplessness and fear.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Agonized, desperate. 2) Background sounds or music: The tense, dramatic music swells, punctuated by the man's strained gasps.)
